detail: init objective="Generous image pipeline for opencodex Anthropic adapter, 4 chained work-phases: (wp1) Phase-0 doc cycle — devlog/260714_image_normalization_pipeline/ with 000_plan.md, 001_prior_art.md (full session research: Claude Code corpus mechanisms, proxy survey, Bun.Image probe), diff-level decade docs 010 (Rule 1b base64-length unit fix), 020 (tiered normalization pipeline: Bun.Image, age-tier pyramid 2000/1024/700px, hash+tier LRU cache, extreme guards), 030 (upstream 413 tightened-retry).
